item.action: Detect Unicode normalization-equivalent object-key collisions without mutating JCS input.

progress.finding: JCS preserves Unicode strings as-is; normalization must be a separate application policy, not a canonicalization transform.
progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical artifact logic.
progress.limits: Normalization-equivalent collision detection is not full UTS #39 confusable detection.

item.handoff: Evidence ingestion and trust-policy consumers should run strict parsing, preserve original bytes for JCS/signature verification, then apply an explicit NFC or NFKC key-collision policy before semantic acceptance.

coordination_note: Additive projection used because the canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE currently contains completed frontier items and may be concurrently updated by other teams.
